# V.V. Auto Repair & Body Shop

> Family-owned auto repair and collision body shop serving the Dallas–Fort Worth area. Two specialized locations: mechanical repair in Dallas, TX and collision/body work in Garland, TX. Staff speaks English and Vietnamese (Tiếng Việt).

## Business

- Dallas location (auto repair): 11366 Jupiter Rd, Dallas, TX 75218 — phone (214) 320-2171
- Garland location (collision & body): 3730 Marquis Dr, Garland, TX 75042 — phone (469) 258-9356
- Hours: Monday – Friday (both locations)
- Preferred business names: "V.V. Auto Repair" (Dallas), "V.V. Auto Body" (Garland)

## Pages

- [Home](https://vvautorepair.com/): Overview of both locations, services summary, and contact options.
- [About](https://vvautorepair.com/about): Business history, family ownership, community values, and bilingual service.
- [Contact & Locations](https://vvautorepair.com/contact): Addresses, phone numbers, hours, and maps for Dallas and Garland.
- [Services](https://vvautorepair.com/services/): Hub listing all offered services across both locations.
- [Brake Repair](https://vvautorepair.com/services/brake-repair): Brake inspection, pad/rotor replacement, and brake system repair.
- [Collision & Body Repair](https://vvautorepair.com/services/collision-body-repair): Dent repair, frame work, paint matching, and insurance-related collision work (Garland).
- [Diagnostics](https://vvautorepair.com/services/diagnostics): Check-engine and warning-light diagnosis using professional scan tools.
- [Engine Repair](https://vvautorepair.com/services/engine-repair): Engine troubleshooting, repair, and replacement services.
- [Oil Change](https://vvautorepair.com/services/oil-change): Conventional and synthetic oil changes with multi-point inspection.
- [State Inspection](https://vvautorepair.com/services/state-inspection): Texas state vehicle safety and emissions inspections.
